# ktag

Prototype of a proposal for targeted monitoring of user actions in a R
Shiny apps.

## Lifecycle

[![Lifecycle:
experimental](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-experimental-orange.svg)](https://lifecycle.r-lib.org/articles/stages.html#experimental)

> Note that the package is in early development stage (lifecycle =
> experimental).

## Installation

The development version can be installed from GitHub with:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("thekangaroofactory/ktag")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`insert_js()`](https://thekangaroofactory.github.io/ktag/reference/insert_js.md)
  : Insert JavaScript
- [`ktag()`](https://thekangaroofactory.github.io/ktag/reference/ktag.md)
  : Log User Actions
- [`ktag_listener()`](https://thekangaroofactory.github.io/ktag/reference/ktag_listener.md)
  : Observe Event on Tag
- [`record()`](https://thekangaroofactory.github.io/ktag/reference/record.md)
  : Start Recording
- [`register_close()`](https://thekangaroofactory.github.io/ktag/reference/register_close.md)
  : Log Session End
